case_title: BERNARDINI ENTERPRISES, INC. VS. DAN CHEEK

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $615.53 FILED BY BERNARDINI ENTERPRISES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CHEEK, DAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-11-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
